function.name: get_latest_headlines
function.description: Get latest news headlines by category.
function.long_description: Fetches the most recent news headlines for a given category such as technology, business, sports, or health using an external news API.

category.description: News category (e.g., technology, business, sports, health)

example_user_queries: Show me the latest technology headlines.
Get the newest business news headlines.
What are the latest sports headlines right now?
Give me the latest entertainment news headlines.
What are the latest world headlines?
Fetch the latest category news for technology.
